ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "favorite_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the movie has received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review if the user wrote one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating if the user gave one */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given by the user */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user */,
  "last_rating_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last rating */,
  "last_review_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last review */,
  "total_movies_watched" INTEGER /* Total number of movies the user has watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being recommended to */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (based on collaborative filtering) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Brief reason for the recommendation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
